name: taskmaster
description: Latest channel — v4 sharded storage (default). Universal AI-powered task and backlog management plus narrative continuity: handovers, issues. Per-task files (.taskmaster/tasks/<id>.md) with a slim YAML index and dirty-scoped, merge-aware saves. v2/v3 backlogs keep working unchanged; migrate with `backlog_migrate_v4`. Requires: uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/)
